'''vajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:piacularly|piacularly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:piacularly|piacularly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vajate|vajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vajatesher|vajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vajatesherĂ«m|vajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vajatero|vajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vajateshĂ«|vajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vajateshĂ«m|vajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivajatero|gokivajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivajateshĂ«|gokivajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivajateshĂ«m|gokivajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govajankerom|govajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govajankeshĂ«|govajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govajankeshĂ«m|govajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govajankeya|govajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vajaterom|vajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vajatemu|vajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vajateya|vajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivajaterom|gokivajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivajatemu|gokivajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivajateya|gokivajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vajajate|vajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vajajatesher|vajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vajajatesherĂ«m|vajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vajajatero|vajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vajajateshĂ«|vajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vajajateshĂ«m|vajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivajajatero|gokivajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivajajateshĂ«|gokivajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivajajateshĂ«m|gokivajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govajajankerom|govajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govajajankeshĂ«|govajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govajajankeshĂ«m|govajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govajajankeya|govajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vajajaterom|vajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vajajatemu|vajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vajajateya|vajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivajajaterom|gokivajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivajajatemu|gokivajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivajajateya|gokivajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠte|vĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠtesher|vĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠtero|vĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠjĂŠtero|gokivĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠjĂŠnkerom|govĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠjĂŠnkeya|govĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠterom|vĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠtemu|vĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠjĂŠteya|vĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠjĂŠterom|gokivĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠjĂŠteya|gokivĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafjafte|vafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafjaftesher|vafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafjaftesherĂ«m|vafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafjaftero|vafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafjafteshĂ«|vafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafjafteshĂ«m|vafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafjaftero|gokivafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafjafteshĂ«|gokivafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafjafteshĂ«m|gokivafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafjafnkerom|govafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafjafnkeshĂ«|govafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafjafnkeshĂ«m|govafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafjafnkeya|govafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafjafterom|vafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafjaftemu|vafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafjafteya|vafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafjafterom|gokivafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafjaftemu|gokivafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafjafteya|gokivafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
